Review_Period: The quarter and year during which the review took place, such as 'Q2 2025'
Reviewed_by: The title or role of the individual or team who performed the review, such as 'Cybersecurity Specialist'
Review_Type: The type of review conducted, such as 'Design Review'
Review_Object: The specific object or aspect that was reviewed, such as 'MediConn's dependencies on critical third-party providers'
Review_Details: Detailed information regarding what was reviewed and the findings of the review
Review_Date: The specific date or date range of when the review was conducted

Review_Details: The Data Protection Officer conducted a privacy impact assessment on the customer database. Some areas for improvement were identified.
The IT Manager reviewed the company's server infrastructure. Minor issues were identified and resolved.
The Security analyst performed a vulnerability assessment on the company's software applications. Some vulnerabilities were found and fixed.
The Data Protection Officer conducted a data protection impact assessment on customer data processing. Several issues were discovered and mitigated.
The cybersecurity specialist conducted a threat modeling exercise. Several potential threats were identified.
The IT Auditor conducted an audit on the company's IT policies. Some non-compliance issues were discovered.
The security analyst performed a penetration test on the company's firewall. No vulnerabilities were detected.
The network administrator conducted a load test on the company's internal network. No significant issues were found.

Review_Object: MediConn's dependencies on critical third-party providers
Review_Details: According to internal IT records, the cybersecurity specialist conducted a design review of the architecture and integration approach for all critical third-party providers between April 1 and June 30, 2025
